prompt.body:
## Goal

The registry's never-invoked `--env` resolution layer is gone end-to-end: no dead CLI flag, no `env_value` parameter, no tests for either, and the `models.toml` precedence comment describes the real three layers.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL delete the `--env` CLI flag (`tools/registry.py:195`) and the `env_value` parameter from `resolve_name` and `resolve` (:60, :69, :72) end-to-end.
- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL rewrite the three tests at `tests/test_registry.py:112-125`: the `env_value` cases go, and the manifest-over-default / task-over-manifest precedence coverage two of them also carry SHALL survive in kept tests.
- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL correct the four-layer-precedence clause in `models.toml:4` to the real three layers (per-task > per-repo manifest > per-role default), leaving line 5's retired-overrides parenthetical to slice D — the shared sentence stays grammatical and true.
- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL NOT change any resolution behavior for the surviving layers, and SHALL NOT reach beyond this named item.
- [ ] Pins green — the full suite stands in as the pin set (prune-only item).
- [ ] The PR body SHALL carry the net-lines record:
  ```
  YR-DEBT-NET-LINES
  net-lines: <int>
  scope: item 4 — registry --env flag + env_value param + tests (leftover, ruled 2026-07-13)
  birth: 9e4b939 (#41), staled by 5e2e72f (#42) — read off the census row
  ```
- [ ] No new dependencies.

## Context & links

`tools/registry.py` carries a `--env` CLI flag (:195) and `resolve_name(..., env_value=None)` / `resolve(..., env_value=None)` parameters (:60, :69, :72) that **no repo caller passes** — the runner routes operator overrides via `--task` (`BUILD_MODEL`/`REVIEW_MODEL`). Delete the flag and the `env_value` parameter end-to-end; rewrite the three tests at `tests/test_registry.py:112-125`: the `env_value` cases go, but two of them also assert manifest-over-default and task-over-manifest precedence — keep that surviving coverage in kept tests. Fix the four-layer-precedence clause in `models.toml:4` to the real three layers **without touching the retired-overrides parenthetical on line 5** (slice D owns it; the two clauses share one sentence — leave it grammatical). Census: Ledger — never invoked / TEST-ONLY; ruled **leftover, delete** 2026-07-13. Birth: `9e4b939` (#41), staled by `5e2e72f` (#42).

## Test expectations

`grep -n "env_value\|--env" tools/registry.py tests/test_registry.py` returns nothing; precedence coverage (task > manifest > default) still asserted; `registry.py validate` and the resolve CLI behave identically for all surviving inputs; full suite green.

## Constraints / out of scope

Behavior-identical for every real caller; `models.toml` entries/ranks untouched; the operator-override path (`BUILD_MODEL`/`REVIEW_MODEL` → `--task`) untouched; line 5's parenthetical is slice D's.

## Size

S — one PR
